'''Denevar''' was a planet. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the planet was controlled by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Adar (Imperial)|Adar]].
